tree.setup: You and a friend planned to go hiking, but it starts raining heavily.
tree.setup_zh: 你和朋友计划去爬山，但是开始下大雨了。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 雨下得这么大，我们还去爬山吗？
turns.text_pinyin: yǔ xià de zhème dà, wǒmen hái qù páshān ma?
turns.text_en: It's raining so hard, are we still going hiking?

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Suggest changing plans because of the rain.

options.text_zh: 我觉得先复习语法吧，那个部分我不太懂。
options.text_pinyin: wǒ juéde xiān fùxí yǔfǎ ba, nà ge bùfen wǒ bú tài dǒng.
options.text_en: I think we should start with grammar, I don't really understand that part.
options.feedback: Off-topic — you were asked to suggest changing plans because of the rain, but this doesn't fit the conversation.

options.text_zh: 可以啊，我以前打过篮球，我们一起去吧。
options.text_pinyin: kěyǐ a, wǒ yǐqián dǎ guò lánqiú, wǒmen yīqǐ qù ba.
options.text_en: Sure, I've played basketball before, let's go together.
options.feedback: Off-topic — you were asked to suggest changing plans because of the rain, but this doesn't fit the conversation.

options.text_zh: 下这么大的雨，太危险了，我们换个活动吧。
options.text_pinyin: xià zhème dà de yǔ, tài wēixiǎn le, wǒmen huàn ge huódòng ba.
options.text_en: With rain this heavy, it's too dangerous, let's switch to a different activity.
options.feedback: Practical and safety-conscious — explains the reasoning and proposes a pivot.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_pinyin: yě duì. nà nǐ xiǎng zuò shénme ne?
turns.text_en: Good point. So what do you want to do instead?

options.text_zh: 可以啊，我以前打过篮球，我们一起去吧。
options.text_pinyin: kěyǐ a, wǒ yǐqián dǎ guò lánqiú, wǒmen yīqǐ qù ba.
options.text_en: Sure, I've played basketball before, let's go together.
options.feedback: Off-topic — you were asked to suggest an indoor activity, but this doesn't fit the conversation.

options.text_zh: 哇，成都看起来很漂亮！你去了哪些地方？
options.text_pinyin: wā, chéngdū kàn qǐlai hěn piàoliang! nǐ qù le nǎxiē dìfang?
options.text_en: Wow, Chengdu looks beautiful! What places did you visit?
options.feedback: Off-topic — you were asked to suggest an indoor activity, but this doesn't fit the conversation.

options.text_zh: 我们去看电影或者找个地方喝咖啡吧。
options.text_pinyin: wǒmen qù kàn diànyǐng huòzhě zhǎo ge dìfang hē kāfēi ba.
options.text_en: Let's go see a movie or find a place to get coffee.
options.feedback: Offers two options — giving choices makes it easy for your friend to agree.

tree.cultural_note: In Chinese, 随便 (suíbiàn, 'whatever/anything is fine') is one of the most frustrating responses in social planning — it puts all the burden on the other person. When someone asks 你想做什么, offering at least one concrete suggestion shows you value the shared time. 要不 (yào bù, 'how about') is a useful soft-suggestion opener.
